description_long: This kiosk consists of two parallel counters separated by a central aisle, each counter equipped with a computer monitor and a privacy screen. The structure is enclosed on both sides and the rear by a series of blue panels featuring the Southwest Airlines heart logo and the text 'Southwest.com.' The panels are supported by a lightweight metal frame, providing both branding and privacy for users at the counters. The counters themselves are white and rectangular, with a clean, modern appearance and ample workspace. The central aisle is open, allowing for easy access to both counters from the front. The overall design is functional and visually striking, suitable for use in airports or other high-traffic urban environments.
description: A modern kiosk with two white counters, blue branded privacy panels, and computer monitors, separated by a central aisle. The structure is enclosed on three sides with Southwest Airlines signage.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the kiosk from the aisle, highlighting the two parallel counters and the central dividing line.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the kiosk from the front, displaying the blue Southwest.com panels, heart logos, and the computer monitors on each counter.
description_view_2: View 2 shows the rear of the kiosk, focusing on the back of the counters and the supporting frames of the privacy panels.
description_view_3: View 3 is similar to View 1 but from the opposite side, again showing the front panels, branding, and computer monitors.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo on blue composite panels, placed on both side and rear panels, with visible text 'Southwest.com' and heart logo.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, open-top design with no visible roof panels or coverings.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, minimalist commercial style with clean lines and branded panels.
